name: pread
method: Place tarama in a mortar and pound it until the roe splits.
Moisten bread under running water; squeeze out any excess.
Add bread to tarama in the mortar and pound until they are completely blended, about 5 minutes.
Put this mixture in a mixing bowl and beat with an electric mixer or a wooden spoon, adding small amounts of olive oil alternately with lemon juice.
Serve in a bowl surrounded by crackers.
Place tarama in bowl and process for 1 minute.
with motor running, add bread, all the olive oil, lemon juice, and onion alternately to form a creamy mixture.
